rationale.R1.6: 'Clean this up' on a passage exhibiting severe intra- and inter-paragraph redundancy (the three rating axes are named in full 5+ times, Krippendorff's alpha is re-explained 3–4 times, the 50–100 word rationale is restated verbatim) makes sentence- and paragraph-level prose polish the sole load-bearing responsibility; the entire failure mode of the artifact is repetition, which is a writing-quality defect.
